zh.lifeSummary: 當Raufe Arderne於1077年出生在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃時，他的父親Henry de Arderne II47歲，母親Lady Agnas Aderne44歲。他於大約1104年與Agnes de Arderne在英國爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1158年在英國瓦維其可爾享年81歲。

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Raufe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spelling representation of the traditional pronunciation of the name   Ralph  , a pronunciation now largely restricted to the upper classes in England.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Raufe Arderne was born in 1077, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, his father, Henry de Arderne II, was 47 and his mother, Lady Agnas Aderne, was 44. He married Agnes de Arderne about 1104, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1158, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 81.

ko.Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Raufe Arderne(이)가 1077년 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Arderne II(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnas Aderne(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1104년 영국 체실르에서 Agnes de Arderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1158년 영국 워윅실르에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raufe Arderne родился в 1077 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Arderne II было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnas Aderne, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Arderne около 1104 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1158 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raufe Arderne nació en 1077, en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Arderne II, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Lady Agnas Aderne, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Agnes de Arderne aproximadamente 1104, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1158, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años.
